summary:

title: Melbourne crash shows Kimi Antonelli is ‘learning F1 the hard way’ – Toto Wolff
summary:
Mercedes team principal Toto Wolff says Kimi Antonelli is ‘learning Formula 1 the hard way’, following the youngster’s sizeable crash in Free Practice 3 at the Australian Grand Prix.

title: Ferrari has the best F1 car, Lando Norris claims: 'Their cornering speed is unbelievable'
